User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the AgriPro Manager system, including administrative roles, farm managers, and farm workers who log in. Controls role-based access and permissions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, corresponding to the Firebase Authentication user ID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for login.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.

assignedFieldIds.description: For managers/workers, an array of Field IDs they are assigned to.

status.description: The status of the user account.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Worker.title: Worker
Worker.description: Represents a farm worker whose labor is managed and tracked by the system. Stores detailed farm labor records.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Worker entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity if this worker has a login account.

fullName.description: The full name of the farm worker.

age.description: The age of the farm worker.

gender.description: The gender of the farm worker.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the farm worker.

address.description: The physical address of the farm worker.

employmentType.description: The employment type of the worker.

wageRate.description: The rate at which the worker is paid.

assignedFieldId.description: Reference to the Field entity where this worker is primarily assigned.

photoURL.description: URL to the worker's profile photo.

status.description: The current employment status of the worker.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the worker profile was created.

PerformanceSummary.title: PerformanceSummary
PerformanceSummary.description: A summary of a worker's performance.

Field.title: Field
Field.description: Represents a specific agricultural field or plot within the farm. Links tasks, productivity, and workers to specific farmland.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Field entity.

fieldName.description: The name or identifier of the field.

sizeUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the field size.

cropType.description: The primary crop type cultivated in this field.

season.description: The current or most recent planting season for this field.

locationDescription.description: A description of the field's location.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the field record was created.

FieldStats.title: FieldStats
FieldStats.description: Statistics for a specific farm field.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a specific task assigned to farm workers within a field. Tracks all operational farm activities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

fieldId.description: Reference to the Field where this task is to be performed.

cropType.description: The specific crop type related to this task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

expectedOutput.description: The expected quantity of work to be completed.

outputUnit.description: The unit for the expected output.

assignedWorkerIds.description: References to Worker entities assigned to this task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

deadline.description: The target date for task completion.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

TaskUpdate.title: TaskUpdate
TaskUpdate.description: An update or comment on a task.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Records the daily clock-in and clock-out for a farm worker. Calculates working hours and supports payroll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance entity.

workerId.description: Reference to the Worker whose attendance is being recorded.

fieldId.description: Reference to the Field where the worker clocked in.

date.description: The date of the attendance record.

clockIn.description: The timestamp when the worker clocked in.

clockOut.description: The timestamp when the worker clocked out.

totalHours.description: The calculated total hours worked for the day.

attendanceStatus.description: The status of the attendance for the day.

recordedBy.description: The ID of the user who recorded the attendance.

Productivity.title: Productivity
Productivity.description: Captures the output or work completed by a worker for a specific task. Tracks farm efficiency and performance metrics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Productivity entity.

workerId.description: Reference to the Worker who recorded this output.

fieldId.description: Reference to the Field where the output was achieved.

taskId.description: Reference to the Task under which this output was achieved.

date.description: The date when the productivity was recorded.

hoursWorked.description: The hours spent to achieve this output.

outputUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the output quantity.

recordedBy.description: The ID of the user who recorded the productivity.

Payroll.title: Payroll
Payroll.description: Contains the calculated payroll for a worker for a specific month. Automates labor cost management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payroll entity.

workerId.description: Reference to the Worker for whom this payroll is generated.

month.description: The month for which the payroll is calculated (e.g., '2026-02').

totalHours.description: The total hours worked by the worker in this month.

totalTasksCompleted.description: Total number of tasks completed in the month.

hourlyPayment.description: Total payment calculated based on hourly wage.

taskPayment.description: Total payment calculated based on task output.

totalPayment.description: The total payment due to the worker for the month.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this payroll summary was generated.

PaymentBreakdown.title: PaymentBreakdown
PaymentBreakdown.description: A breakdown of a single day's payment contributing to a payroll.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a generated report for auditing and analysis.

definition.description: Stores user account information and roles for access control.
Contains detailed profiles for all farm workers.
Stores information about specific farm fields or plots.
Defines and tracks all operational farm activities.
Subcollection for updates and comments on a task.
Top-level collection for all daily attendance records.
Top-level collection for all productivity entries.
Top-level collection for all monthly payroll summaries.
Subcollection detailing daily payments for a payroll period.
Collection for storing generated reports for auditing and analysis.

firestore.reasoning: The database is designed with a normalized, collection-based approach to ensure scalability and efficient querying. Top-level collections for `users`, `workers`, `fields`, `tasks`, `attendance`, `productivity`, and `payroll` create clear separation of concerns. Document references (`workerId`, `fieldId`, `taskId`) are used to link related data across collections, which is a standard NoSQL practice to avoid deep nesting and enable flexible queries. This structure supports common query patterns (e.g., fetching all tasks for a specific field) and allows for robust role-based access control by checking a user's role in the top-level `users` collection before granting access to other collections.
